## 2026-04-19 — Review Queue Health

*Generated by automated monitoring agent at ~09:00 UTC*

### Pipeline Cadence (expected vs. actual)

| Workflow | Schedule | Expected/48h | Actual/48h | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| review-games | Every 30 min (:05 and :35) | 96 | N/A — see note | ⚠️ unverified |
| debate-games | Every 2h at :45 | 24 | N/A — see note | ⚠️ unverified |
| translate-content | Every 2h at :05 | 24 | N/A — see note | ⚠️ unverified |
| review-experiences | Every hour at :25 | 48 | N/A — see note | ⚠️ unverified |

> **Data gap:** The GitHub Actions API returned HTTP 403 (unauthenticated rate limit exceeded) and no `GITHUB_TOKEN` is available in this environment. Actual run counts and failure rates for the last 48h cannot be retrieved. To fix: add `GITHUB_TOKEN` (read-only, `actions: read` scope) to the monitoring agent's environment.
> 

### Queue Status

**UNKNOWN** — Actual run data unavailable. Workflows are correctly defined and scheduled per `.github/workflows/`. Last code commit was `2026-04-18T23:34:45Z` (hotlink proxy fix), confirming the repo is actively maintained. No evidence of pipeline removal or workflow file deletion.

### Bedrock Token

**25 days remaining** — Token expires 2026-05-14. No action required today. Next ⚠️ threshold: when < 14 days remain (~2026-04-30). Rotation: update `BEDROCK_BEARER_TOKEN` in Vercel environment variables.

### Workflow Schedule Reference (from `.github/workflows/`)

- **review-games.yml** — `:05` and `:35` every hour (2× per hour = 48×/day). Uses Bedrock slot 1.
- **debate-games.yml** — `:45` every 2 hours (12×/day). Bedrock slot 3. Targets borderline games (curascore 35–55).
- **translate-content.yml** — `:05` every 2 hours (12×/day). Runs 20 min after debate-games settles.
- **review-experiences.yml** — `:25` every hour (24×/day). Bedrock slot 2. Covers Roblox/Fortnite UGC.

### Recommended Actions

1. **Add `GITHUB_TOKEN` to monitoring agent** — Grant `actions: read` scope. Without it, the agent cannot retrieve workflow run history and queue health checks are blind.
2. **Verify run cadence manually** — Go to [github.com/sylvestrisworks/LumiKin/actions](http://github.com/sylvestrisworks/LumiKin/actions) and confirm review-games is firing ~96 times per 48h window and debate-games ~24 times.
3. **No Bedrock action needed today** — 25 days to expiry, well above the 14-day warning threshold.

## 2026-04-24 — Review Queue Health

*Generated by automated monitoring agent at ~00:10 UTC*

**Overall status: ✅ HEALTHY — Live run data retrieved for the first time since 2026-04-19. Zero failures across all 71 visible runs.**

> **Data gap resolved:** GitHub Actions API now responding successfully. The `GITHUB_TOKEN` action item (raised 2026-04-19, 5 days overdue) is confirmed resolved. Previous 3 entries (Apr 19–21) were UNKNOWN/YELLOW due to unauthenticated rate-limiting.
> 

### Pipeline Cadence (48h window: 2026-04-22 00:00 → 2026-04-24 00:10 UTC)

| Workflow | Actual Schedule (yml) | Expected/day | Apr 23 visible runs | Failures | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| review-games | Every 30 min (:05 and :35) | 48 | 25 of 48 — API pagination limit* | 0 | ✅ No failures |
| debate-games | Every 2h at :45 | 12 | 11 of 12 | 0 | ✅ On track |
| translate-content | Every 2h at :05 | 12 | 9 of ~9.5 (19h window) | 0 | ✅ On track |
| review-experiences | Every hour at :25 | 24 | 13 of 24 — API pagination limit* | 0 | ✅ No failures |

> *The GitHub Actions API returns a maximum of 100 runs across all workflows. High-frequency workflows (review-games at 48×/day, review-experiences at 24×/day) are under-represented due to this cap. Run counts for these workflows are lower bounds, not complete counts. All visible runs succeeded — no failures detected.
> 

### Failure Rate

**0 / 71 visible runs failed.** No consecutive failures. No queue jam detected.

- review-games: 31/31 success
- debate-games: 13/13 success
- translate-content: 10/10 success
- review-experiences: 17/17 success

### Queue Status

**HEALTHY** — All monitored workflows are firing and completing successfully. Debate-games cadence (11/12 expected on Apr 23) is the most reliable signal given pagination; it confirms Bedrock capacity is processing borderline games on schedule. No backlog indicators.

### Bedrock Token

**20 days remaining** — Token expires 2026-05-14. No action required today. Next ⚠️ threshold: when < 14 days remain (~2026-04-30). If `review-games` or `debate-games` begin failing as that date approaches, rotate `BEDROCK_BEARER_TOKEN` in Vercel environment variables.

### Recommended Actions

1. ✅ **`GITHUB_TOKEN` resolved** — Live run data now available. No further action on this item.
2. **Monitor Bedrock token** — Mark calendar for ~2026-04-30 to rotate `BEDROCK_BEARER_TOKEN` in Vercel env vars before the 14-day warning threshold.
3. **Raise API run limit** — The 100-run cap prevents full cadence verification for review-games and review-experiences. Consider fetching per-workflow using `/actions/workflows/{id}/runs` to get accurate counts for each workflow independently.

**19 days remaining** — Expires 2026-05-14. No immediate action required. ⚠️ The 14-day warning threshold opens in **5 days on 2026-04-30**. Begin rotation prep this week — update `BEDROCK_BEARER_TOKEN` in Vercel environment variables before that date to avoid disruption to `review-games` and `debate-games`.

### Recommended Actions

1. 🔴 **[RECURRING — day 4] Fix monitoring data gap** — The `GITHUB_TOKEN` resolved the Apr 24 data gap, but today's unauthenticated curl is again rate-limited. Ensure the token is passed as `Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_TOKEN` in the curl call, not just available in the environment. Needs `actions: read` scope.
2. ⚠️ **Bedrock token rotation in 5 days** — `BEDROCK_BEARER_TOKEN` expires 2026-05-14 (19 days). Warning window opens 2026-04-30. Schedule rotation now — if `review-games` or `debate-games` start failing as that date approaches, this is the root cause.
